sections.paragraph:
ἀνώτερος, έρα, ον [ἄνω] in NT only as adv. in the nt. comp. form ἀνώτερον.

—1. ‘in a position that is relatively higher than the present one’, of a more prestigious place in a social setting Lk 14:10.

—2. ‘relatively before in expression of someth.’, of a place in a written document earlier, above Hb 10:8.
